hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'ollama serve'; then if [ "$(uname)" = "Darwin" ]; then pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:11434 2>/dev/null || true); else pids=$(ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | awk -F'[,=]' '/:11434 /{for(i=1;i<=NF;i++) if($i=="pid") print $(i+1)}' 2>/dev/null || lsof -ti tcp:11434 2>/dev/null || true); fi; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "[hook] Killing existing Ollama on port 11434 (PID: $pids)" >&2; echo "$pids" | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; fi; fi
